_schema_note: net_worth values marked method='mobile_app_verified' are read from MISA's mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' screen (Tổng có − Tổng nợ) — currently the MOST complete source. method='dashboard_verified' is the website's /wallets/totaldashboard API, which is MISSING ~400M: ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED 2026-06-23 — the savings book 'tikcop 5 week' (active, matures 2026-10-13, rate 7.5%) IS present in the website's /wallets/savings response but with currentAmount stuck at 0 (a MISA website data bug, confirmed via mobile app screenshot showing the correct balance 401,917,738). This silently undercounts /wallets/saving/summary and therefore /wallets/totaldashboard by the same amount. No client-side fix exists — cross-check with mobile app when in doubt. method='reconstructed' values are manually summed from account/transaction APIs and inherit the same gap.

snapshots.label: 23/06 (trước khi user fix bug)
snapshots.note: VERIFIED against mobile app 'Tài chính hiện tại' + 'Quản lý sổ tiết kiệm' screens (screenshots 2026-06-23 10:19 and 10:27), captured BEFORE the user fixed the website-side data bug. ROOT CAUSE: website's /wallets/savings returned wallet 'tikcop 5 week' (active, matures 2026-10-13, 7.5%) with currentAmount=0 (MISA website bug). User then closed that broken entry and recreated it as 'tikcop 5m' with the correct balance — see the next snapshot for the post-fix verified total.

snapshots.label: 23/06 (sau khi user fix bug)
snapshots.note: User closed the buggy 'tikcop 5 week' (currentAmount stuck at 0) and recreated it as 'tikcop 5m' (401,918,000 ₫, same maturity 2026-10-13, same 7.5% rate). Re-fetched via website API GET /wallets/totaldashboard = 7,747,602,027 — now self-consistent (no more website savings bug). Manual cost-basis reconstruction gives 7,822,507,507 (~75M higher) — this residual gap is consistent both before and after the tikcop fix, so it is NOT related to that bug; most likely explanation is unrealized P&L on VCBS/VCBF/FPTS/Finhay (cost-basis ~1.49B vs current market value, ETF/Fund prices fluctuate ~5%). Treat 7,747,602,027 as the current best authoritative Net Worth going forward; the website API should now be reliable again since the underlying data bug is fixed.

Read directly from GET /wallets/totaldashboard, no reconstruction. Cost-basis reconstruction (accounts+savings+VCBS/VCBF/FPTS/Finhay cost-basis-remaining) gives 7,872,791,270 (~0.94% higher) — consistent with the known unrealized-P&L gap seen on 23/06, not a data bug. Investment (VCBS/VCBF/FPTS/Finhay/Larion) at 2.17B, Savings rebuilt to 1.04B (from 0.64B on 23/06) after the mid-June VCBS redemption was redeployed into new term deposits (vcb 1 month, tikcop 1m/5m) and fresh VCBS/FPTS/VCBF/Finhay DCA contributions. CONFIRMED DATA BUG: excluded a 2,005,479 ghost balance on a closed 'nam á 6m' savings book (endDate 2024-06-01) that user confirmed is fully withdrawn — /wallets/totaldashboard (net_worth above) likely still includes it, true net worth probably ~7,736,882,087. RECLASSIFIED (user correction 2026-07-06): Tikop (195,024,366) moved from investment to liquid — it's a robo-savings/cash-parking product, not a growth investment. Prior snapshots (21/05-23/06) still have Tikop bundled into investment (schema/categorization not retroactively changed since per-date Tikop breakdown wasn't tracked separately before) — do not compare investment/liquid deltas across the 23/06→06/07 boundary 1-for-1.

Read directly from GET /wallets/totaldashboard, no reconstruction. Cost-basis reconstruction gives 7,869,952,567 (~0.93% higher) — same unrealized-P&L gap pattern as 06/07, not a new data bug. Savings unchanged from 06/07 (1,038,686,928 — no book matured/opened since). Liquid down 5.0M (Tikop −45M, vcb +40M from 66.9M salary posted 01/07 net of Học phí/Hiếu hỉ/Nhà cửa spend). Ghost balance on closed 'nam á 6m' (2,005,479) still present in /wallets/savings as of today — excluded from savings total above, consistent with 06/07 treatment; still unresolved by MISA.

Read directly from GET /wallets/totaldashboard, no reconstruction. Cost-basis reconstruction gives 7,855,319,496 gross / 7,794,319,496 net (~0.94% higher) — same unrealized-P&L gap pattern as prior days, not a new data bug. No report on 07-08 (gap day). Net worth down ~14.6M vs 07/07 (7,736,052,566 -> 7,721,419,496) over 2 days — normal drift, not the stale-savings-book bug pattern (too small). Gold down 12M (price fluctuation). Liquid down 26.6M vs 07/07. Savings up ~2M (interest accrual, no book matured/opened). Ghost balance on closed nam a 6m (2,005,479) still present in /wallets/savings, excluded from savings total, still unresolved by MISA. Tikop (150,024,366) classified as Liquid per 2026-07-06 user correction (robo-savings/cash-parking, not growth investment).
